3088140.name: Trials Of The Taker
3088140.description:
Trials of The Taker


You've escaped certain death by leaping through a mysterious portal. But, now you're trapped in a strange dungeon full of puzzles that you'll need to solve in order to get home! With any luck, you'll find artifacts along the way that will aid you in your quest.

Each puzzle has been hand crafted for a unique experience. it will take clever thinking and a strong will to make it to the end. This is a dark and difficult dungeon, and there is not much hand holding, so be ready to explore every option and use creative problem solving to succeed.


About This Game

This is a first person dungeon puzzler. Each room is a puzzle that will need to be solved by manipulating interactable objects in order to move on. You'll find artifacts that can be used to aid you in your quest as you progress. Players can access an optional built-in hint system, but will not be forced to if they prefer to attempt these trials without a crutch. Navigate the dungeon's treacherous, and often, deadly puzzles to find and unlock portals that may lead your character back home, while hopefully escaping with some powerful artifacts! You are the taker, after all.

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
